SEARCH
Package dev.jeka.core.api.depmanagement

Class JkDependencySetModifier

java.lang.Object
dev.jeka.core.api.depmanagement.JkDependencySetModifier
public class JkDependencySetModifier extends Object
This class allows modifying a JkDependencySet using a series of method calls.

  • Method Summary

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    JkDependencySetModifier
    add(JkCoordinate coordinates)
    Adds a JkCoordinate to the JkDependencySetModifier.
    JkDependencySetModifier
    add(JkDependency dependency)
    Adds a dependency to the JkDependencySetModifier.
    JkDependencySetModifier
    add(JkDependencySet.Hint hint, String coordinate)
    Adds a dependency to the JkDependencySetModifier.
    JkDependencySetModifier
    add(String coordinate, JkTransitivity transitivity, Object... tokens)
    Adds a dependency to the JkDependencySetModifier.
    JkDependencySetModifier
    add(String coordinate, Object... tokens)
    Adds a dependency to the JkDependencySetModifier.
    JkDependencySetModifier
    add(Path file)
    Adds a file-based dependency to the JkDependencySetModifier.
    JkDependencySetModifier
    addVersionProvider(JkVersionProvider versionProvider)
    Adds a version provider to the JkDependencySetModifier.
    JkDependencySetModifier
    addWithExclusions(String coordinate, String... exclusions)
    Adds a dependency to the JkDependencySetModifier with exclusions.
    JkDependencySet
    get()
    Compiutes a JkDependencySet by applying the modifier function to an empty set.
    JkDependencySetModifier
    modify(Function<JkDependencySet,JkDependencySet> modifier)
    Modifies the JkDependencySet using the provided modifier function.
    JkDependencySetModifier
    move(String moduleId, JkDependencySet.Hint hint)
    Moves a dependency within the JkDependencySetModifier,.
    static JkDependencySetModifier
    of()
    Returns a new instance of JkDependencySetModifier.
    JkDependencySetModifier
    remove(String moduleId)
    Removes a dependency from the JkDependencySetModifier.
    JkDependencySetModifier
    remove(Path file)
    Removes a file-based dependency from the JkDependencySetModifier.
    JkDependencySetModifier
    removeAll()
    Removes all dependencies from the JkDependencySetModifier.

  • Method Details

    • of

      public static JkDependencySetModifier of()
      Returns a new instance of JkDependencySetModifier.

    • add

      public JkDependencySetModifier add(String coordinate, Object... tokens)
      Adds a dependency to the JkDependencySetModifier.
      Parameters:
      coordinate - the dependency coordinate in the format of group:artifactId:version
      tokens - the tokens for formatting the coordinate (in case of variable version for instance)

    • addWithExclusions

      public JkDependencySetModifier addWithExclusions(String coordinate, String... exclusions)
      Adds a dependency to the JkDependencySetModifier with exclusions.
      Parameters:
      coordinate - the dependency coordinate in the format of group:artifactId:version
      exclusions - the moduleIds to exclude (e.g. "a.group:a.name", "another.group:another.name", ...)

    • move

      public JkDependencySetModifier move(String moduleId, JkDependencySet.Hint hint)
      Moves a dependency within the JkDependencySetModifier,. This is used to alter the order in which dependencies should be declared.

    • add

      public JkDependencySetModifier add(JkCoordinate coordinates)
      Adds a JkCoordinate to the JkDependencySetModifier.

    • add

      public JkDependencySetModifier add(Path file)
      Adds a file-based dependency to the JkDependencySetModifier.

    • add

      public JkDependencySetModifier add(JkDependency dependency)
      Adds a dependency to the JkDependencySetModifier.

    • add

      public JkDependencySetModifier add(String coordinate, JkTransitivity transitivity, Object... tokens)
      Adds a dependency to the JkDependencySetModifier.
      Parameters:
      coordinate - the dependency coordinate in the format of group:artifactId:version
      transitivity - the transitivity of the dependency
      tokens - the tokens for formatting the coordinate (in case of variable version for instance)

    • add

      public JkDependencySetModifier add(JkDependencySet.Hint hint, String coordinate)
      Adds a dependency to the JkDependencySetModifier.
      Parameters:
      hint - the hint for prioritizing the dependency
      coordinate - the dependency coordinate in the format of group:artifactId:version

    • addVersionProvider

      public JkDependencySetModifier addVersionProvider(JkVersionProvider versionProvider)
      Adds a version provider to the JkDependencySetModifier.

    • remove

      public JkDependencySetModifier remove(String moduleId)
      Removes a dependency from the JkDependencySetModifier.
      Parameters:
      moduleId - the module id of the dependency to be removed (e.g a.group:a-module)

    • removeAll

      public JkDependencySetModifier removeAll()
      Removes all dependencies from the JkDependencySetModifier.

    • remove

      public JkDependencySetModifier remove(Path file)
      Removes a file-based dependency from the JkDependencySetModifier.
      Parameters:
      file - the file representing the dependency to be removed

    • modify

      public JkDependencySetModifier modify(Function<JkDependencySet,JkDependencySet> modifier)
      Modifies the JkDependencySet using the provided modifier function. The modifier function takes a JkDependencySet as input and returns a modified JkDependencySet.
      Parameters:
      modifier - the function used to modify the JkDependencySet

    • get

      public JkDependencySet get()
      Compiutes a JkDependencySet by applying the modifier function to an empty set.
